title: Beef short ribs
excerpt: Ingredients 1.5 kg ribs cut into pieces 2 onions 1 bulb of garlic 6 carrots 4 celery sticks 4 cloves 1 tin of tomato puree 30 ml sugar 15 ml smoked paprika 1 packet brown onion soup 100 ml Worcestershire sauce 100 ml Chutney 100 ml All Gold tomato sauce 125 ml red wine 4 large potatoes halved …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1.5 kg ribs cut into pieces
  • 2 onions
  • 1 bulb of garlic
  • 6 carrots
  • 4 celery sticks
  • 4 cloves
  • 1 tin of tomato puree
  • 30 ml sugar
  • 15 ml smoked paprika
  • 1 packet brown onion soup
  • 100 ml Worcestershire sauce
  • 100 ml Chutney
  • 100 ml All Gold tomato sauce
  • 125 ml red wine
  • 4 large potatoes halved
  • 250 ml water
  • Salt and pepper

Method

  1. Put the beef ribs with the cloves and water into a pressure cooker for 40 minutes
  2. Cut the onions and carrots into rings and pack them into the bottom of an ovenproof dish
  3. Pack the half-cooked ribs on top of the onions and carrots
  4. Mix the rest of the ingredients and pour over the ribs
  5. Cut the bulb of garlic through the middle and put it into the dish too
  6. Cover the dish and bake in the oven for 60 minutes at 180C
  7. Uncover the meat. Now add the potatoes and bake uncovered for another 90 minutes.
  8. The meat should be soft and coming easily off the bone.
